title: FNaF Resuited
description:
FNaF Resuited – Become the Animatronics!

Wear suits, perform jumpscares, and build Freddy’s Pizzeria in Minecraft!
body:
---

**New Animatronics on the way...**
![coming soon...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce6e1878223be203063a46e32039442f4f99baa9.png)

---

**FNaF Resuited – Experience the Horror of Freddy’s in Minecraft!**

Step into the eerie world of **Five Nights at Freddy’s** – now in Minecraft! This mod lets you **roleplay, build your own pizzeria, and use special animatronic suit features** like jumpscares and sound effects!

**🛠 Features:**

**✔ Roleplay & Build Mode** – Create your own Freddy Fazbear’s Pizzeria with themed decor blocks! 

**✔ Animatronic Suits with Special Abilities** – Perform jumpscares and play spooky sounds! 

**✔ Multiple Playable Characters** – Become Freddy, Bonnie, Chica, Foxy, and more!

---

**Animatronic Suits:**
- Freddy & Freddy with Microphone
- Bonnie & Bonnie with Guitar
- Chica & Chica with Cupcake
- Foxy
- Endo
- Fredbear
- Spring Bonnie
- Springlock versions of Golden Freddy & Spring Bonnie

🛑 **Note:** Not all features are fully functional yet, but this mod still offers a thrilling FNaF experience in Minecraft!

Are you ready for the ultimate suit horror? 🔦👁

---
